summary: PR 2353 decompiled and matched a large slice of Kirby neutral-special copy functions in ftKb_SpecialNNs.c, with supporting header/type updates. The bot report records +0.50% matched code, +19284 bytes, 42 new matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNNs, plus a .sdata2 improvement.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; replaces many placeholder functions with C implementations and adds local helpers, includes, constants, and matching tactics.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: ftKb_SpecialNNs.c +1349/-181, 15 hunks

raw_diff: added ftKb_JObj* helpers, ftKb_AirScaleAnimStep, ftKb_NsSpecialAirNStart_Anim, ftKb_NsSpecialAirNHold_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNDk_800FF8EC, ftKb_SpecialNDk_800FFA10, fn_80100E0C, ftKb_SpecialNPr_* functions
text_corpus: bot report lists 42 new matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNNs

key_files.role: Type refinement for Kirby fighter vars: three adjacent floats at x8C/x90/x94 become a Vec3 x8C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h changes ftKb_FighterVars fields x8C/x90/x94 from float,float,float to Vec3 x8C

key_files.role: Initializer adjusted to write x8C.x/y/z after the Vec3 type change.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKb_SpecialN_800F190C writes fp->fv.kb.x8C.x/y/z = 1.0F

key_files.role: Prototype update for ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C to include a bool argument.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C(Fighter_GObj* gobj, bool arg1)

key_files.role: Doxygen declaration updated to mirror the ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C bool argument.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKb_Init.dox prototype changed to include bool arg1

what_changed: Added numerous C implementations in ftKb_SpecialNNs.c for Kirby copied neutral specials, especially Ness, Donkey Kong, and Jigglypuff/Purin-related SpecialN routines.

Added local inline helpers for repeated animation/setup behavior, including ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim_inline, ftKb_AirScaleAnimStep, ftKb_PrScaleAnimStep, ftKb_PrRestoreScale, and ftKb_PrSetCallbacks.
Added local HSD_JObj helper wrappers for scale/rotation/dirty-matrix operations, using raw assert strings and line numbers from jobj.h-style evidence in the diff.
Changed ftKb_FighterVars x8C/x90/x94 from three floats to a single Vec3 x8C and updated initialization sites to assign x/y/z fields.
Updated the ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C prototype in both ftKb_Init.h and ftKb_Init.dox to take a bool argument.
Added includes required by the new implementations, including camera, landing, ft_0877, cliff common, mplib, and MSL trigf headers.
The bot report records 42 new matched functions/items for ftKb_SpecialNNs and one .sdata2 improvement.
smart_moves: The PR used a Vec3 for the three adjacent Kirby fighter-var scale slots, making subsequent scale logic use typed x/y/z field accesses instead of separate scalar fields.
Shared inline helpers captured duplicated setup paths, such as spawning the Ness PK Flash item and setting callbacks from both ground and air start animations.
Several air physics functions were reduced to a shared implementation call plus narrow PAD_STACK use, replacing earlier fake comma-operator regalloc comments shown in the diff.
Header and dox prototypes were kept in sync for ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C when the recovered body required an extra bool parameter.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When adjacent fighter-var scalar slots are consistently consumed as a vector, a temporary or recovered Vec3 field can simplify scale code and make initialization/source access more truthful.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h x8C/x90/x94 -> Vec3 x8C
diff_excerpt: ftKb_SpecialN_800F190C initializes x8C.x/y/z
raw_diff: ftKb_PrScaleAnimStep and ftKb_AirScaleAnimStep read fp->fv.kb.x8C.x/y/z

decomp_lessons.lesson: For repeated ground/air animation setup, a local static inline can preserve one source shape while avoiding duplicated generated-looking blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim_inline used by ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim and ftKb_NsSpecialAirNStart_Anim

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function signatures should be propagated to owning declarations, including dox declarations when present.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKb_Init.h and ftKb_Init.dox both update ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C to include bool arg1

naming_conventions.convention: Kirby copy-special helper names use the ftKb_ prefix and include copied-character abbreviations such as Ns, Dk, and Pr in function names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_NsSpecialAirNHold_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNDk_800FF8EC, ftKb_PrSpecialN_Anim-related names

naming_conventions.convention: Local extracted helpers in this PR use a descriptive ftKb_* name and sometimes an _inline suffix when the helper is intended to inline into callers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim_inline, ftKb_DkSpecialNStart_Coll_inline

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names were retained where semantics were not clarified, e.g. fn_80100E0C and fn_80105978.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80100E0C body added while retaining address-style name; fn_80105978 retained

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Narrow PAD_STACK use was added in multiple recovered functions to preserve stack/code shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(20) in Ness start animations; PAD_STACK(4) in air physics and fn_80100E0C; PAD_STACK(8) in Donkey Kong and Purin routines
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Loaded evidence shows bot match results but no detailed objdiff excerpt explaining each PAD_STACK requirement.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A static const motion-flags bitmask was used in fn_80100E0C for a large Fighter_ChangeMotionState flag argument.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static u32 const mf = bitmask in fn_80100E0C
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Supported as PR evidence, but not enough evidence to generalize beyond this function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Raw assert-backed local JObj helper wrappers were used to match operations such as get/set scale, set rotation Y, and dirty-matrix propagation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: comment 'fake HSD_JObj helpers' and ftKb_JObjGetScale, ftKb_JObjSetScale, ftKb_JObjSetRotationY
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: This is notable because current standards prefer existing header inlines/macros when identifiable; curator should not promote fake helpers as a preferred standard without more evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: The ABS macro was used for velocity magnitude when computing hitbox state/damage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_SpecialNPr_80100F94 computes abs_vel and damage with ABS(fp->self_vel.x)/ABS(fp->gr_vel)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Consistent with canonical macro cleanup, but only local evidence is present.

follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for ftKb_JObjGetScale or 'fake HSD_JObj helpers' to see whether these helpers were replaced with canonical HSD_JObj inline/helper usage.
Search for later edits to src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/types.h ftKb_FighterVars x8C to confirm whether Vec3 x8C remained the accepted field model.
Search for ftKb_SpecialNPr_8010140C call sites after PR 2353 to see how the bool argument was named or semantically clarified.
Search for remaining PAD_STACK in ftKb_SpecialNNs.c to identify cleanup opportunities or documented objdiff requirements.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Model adjacent scale slots as Vec3 when local use proves vector semantics
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2353 changed Kirby fighter vars x8C/x90/x94 from separate floats to Vec3 x8C, then used x/y/z accesses in initialization and scale animation helpers. This is a candidate lesson for typed-fields-over-pointer/scalar cleanup when adjacent fields are repeatedly consumed as a vector.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h x8C/x90/x94 -> Vec3 x8C
diff_excerpt: ftKb_SpecialN_800F190C initializes x8C.x/y/z
raw_diff: ftKb_PrScaleAnimStep and ftKb_AirScaleAnimStep consume x8C.x/y/z

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use local static inline helpers to share duplicated ground/air setup when they preserve match shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2353 extracted shared Kirby Ness start-animation setup into ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim_inline and used it from both ground and air start animation functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim_inline and calls from ftKb_NsSpecialNStart_Anim and ftKb_NsSpecialAirNStart_Anim

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_FighterVars x8C modeled as Vec3 in PR 2353

source_update_candidates.title: Audit fake HSD_JObj helpers in ftKb_SpecialNNs.c
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2353 added local helpers labeled 'fake HSD_JObj helpers' that manually expand assert-backed JObj operations. Current standards prefer existing HSD_JObj inline/helper forms when line-number evidence identifies them, so this may be a future cleanup/audit target rather than a style to promote.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: comment 'fake HSD_JObj helpers'
raw_diff: raw __assert calls with ftKb_Init_804D3DD0/804D3DD8/804D3DE0 and jobj.h-like line numbers
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential standards/path cleanup candidate; evidence does not justify promoting fake local JObj wrappers as accepted style.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval details; no review comments or reviews were loaded.
Do not promote PAD_STACK usage from this PR as a general tactic without narrower objdiff evidence for each function.
Do not promote raw assert-backed fake HSD_JObj helpers as preferred style; current standards point toward header inlines/helpers when identifiable.
